abstract.t: This document defines the Agent Directory (AD), a service where agents register their identity, capabilities, and reachable endpoints and where clients discover them by capability. The AD adapts the Constrained RESTful Environments (CoRE) Resource Directory (RFC 9176) from constrained IoT devices to software agents, reusing its registration, lookup, and soft-state lifecycle model. The AD uses HTTP and JSON. MCP and A2A define how agents interact; this document defines how they are found.
